entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Mobile Application in SAP Build – "N...
entry.content: solved. the problem was that I exchanged the booster... selecting  Build Apps instead of Build code. Now the tutorial is working fine

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Mobile Application in SAP Build – "N...
entry.content: solved. the problem was that I exchanged the booster... selecting Build Apps instead of Build code. Now the tutorial is working fine

entry.title: Re: Configure SAP-SIC - For Vertex
entry.content: Thanks for your reply, Medha, but as per my understanding, server group will lead the program registration to one server at the time of registration. It won't register the program on every gateway/ app server. On the other hand, for server group we need to use ASCS, whose gateway we are not supposed to use. Also what about the port while connecting ASCS?

entry.title: Re: Can we generate service logic files in TypeScript wit...
entry.content:
Hello Satyajit,

sure, for new projects you can enable TypeScript (see docu), while existing projects can be migrated to TypeScript (see blog post).

Cheers, Oliver

entry.title: Monitoring of automatic triggers (subscriptions) in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there any way to monitor when a trigger (subscription) get call in DM via MQTT, is there any way we can check if the trigger is successfully called or failed.

We can't find such app in DM where we can monitor the triggers like we monitor the production process (using Monitor production process app). 

Can anyone please help or suggest where we can monitor these triggers in SAP DM. 

Quick help will be appreciated.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Re: Issue in activating Extended CDS View
entry.content: just do what I said,

entry.title: Re: Blog It Forward - Daniel Mateo
entry.content:
What an amazing post, Dani.
I really enjoyed getting to know more from your professional role, it's clear that your passion for SAP goes in line with your adventure spirit; it's crazy your story in Bulgaria and how you survive in this SAP changing world.
Thanks for sharing, Dani ¡¡¡

entry.title: AG - Meeting - Global Trade Management
entry.content:
It's that time again – the next meeting of the DSAG AG GTM is approaching! On May 8th, 2025, we will meet on the premises of the JEBSEN & JESSEN GmbH & Co. KG in Hamburg.

The focus will be on GTM & AI, and on new Fiori apps for GTM. As always, questions about GTM are welcome, and suggestions for changes can be raised.

Please register for the event as per usual in the DSAGNet. We look forward to a lively exchange!

entry.title: Re: SAP Build and SAP Build Code: Comprehensive Tools for Novice to Expert Developers
entry.content: very interesting article

entry.title: Re: Quick tip: How to check if the changes from the adaptation project are active?
entry.content: Greetings @Dhirajk2024 , please post your question in Technology Q&A section, If useful, link back to the blog post for context.

entry.title: Error while Enabling Advance GL Account option - the number of expanded account determination rules
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working with SAP Business One version 10.0 and I'm trying to insert Advanced G/L Account Determination Rules, but I receive the following error the i Cannot migrate data: the number of expanded account determination rules exceeds the allowed limit.

I understand that the system has a limit of 4,000 expanded rules, but I'm not sure if this limit has changed in version 10.0 or later.

- Does anyone know if the limit of 4,000 expanded rules is still valid in the latest version?

- Is there a way to view how many rules i have got?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Purpose Codes in Payment Media in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Surya,

I am not familiar with the structure of the DTAZV format, but it is not a DME based format. Rather it uses function modules assigned to events in the transaction OBPM1. The FMs do not work with Payment Reason at all. My assumption is that you want to assign it somewhere to a transaction, so you would probably need to extend the output in customer event 31. Depending on your scenario, you would be able to map FPAYH-PAYT_RSN, but to be able to map FPAYHX-SND_CTRY_CODE and FPAYHX-REC_CTRY_CODE, you would need to assign also the Application Area.

Kind regards,

Ondrej

entry.title: Re: Deploying Fiori application on S4 side on premise edi...
entry.content:
looks like you have no idea about odata service

ui5 call odata service, which in turn can call function module in the odata service implementation.

entry.title: Re: DELTA-DTP error when loading data from 2LIS_11_VAITM
entry.content: Which sources of error-messages have you checked? Also checked ST22, SLG1, SM21?

entry.title: Big fix from SAP for Talent Intelligence hub users
entry.content:
Major issue Fix Alert: #SuccessFactors #Talent #Talent Intelligence Hub #PMGM

Before fix : 

After a patch delivered in February 2025, the Attribute Picker(when we navigate to Growth portfolio and try to add attributes) were using "AND" condition to return the results when using tag filter.
This behavior was limiting the results returned when trying to search for attributes using more than one tag filter, as the system would only return attributes that have associated ALL the tags used for the search.

For example, searching with the filters "Core" and "Critical" will only return attributes that have both tags, and attributes that do not meet this criteria is not included in the filter results.

 

After Fix :

After the patch is delivered, the tag filter behavior in the attribute picker will use "OR" condition again. 
For example, searching with the filters "Core" and "Critical" will return attributes that have either one of tags or all.

 

This behavior will be corrected in a patch during the 1H 2025 Release:

  • For Preview environments a patch is planned for 2505p1, that will be deployed on April 22nd;
  • For Production environments a patch is planned for 2411p27, that will be deployed on April 24th.

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: Re: EMIGALL Cook book
entry.content:
Hi,

yes i found that page as well but also here the SAP Note which i am looking for is already not available anymore.

1340047Guide for IS Migration Workbench (transaction EMIGALL)

entry.title: Re: Deploying Fiori application on S4 side on premise edi...
entry.content: Hello Junwu. Yes I saw that is the main approach (that is why I've included it in my questions) but I am curious if there are any approach that does not require me to create Odata services on the backend. For example with CDS view I able to create reports at fiori side without creating odata service myself. I am hoping to find a standard solution that handles these calls instead of me .

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of Fields in Job Information (1H 2025)
entry.content: 😁Thank you @Anita_Brita! Yes, I think the change-reason field actually does confuse quite a few customers as it is often labeled "Event Reason" in their config but it isn't the actual event reason field. We hope to remove this unnecessary complexity by deprecating the field.

entry.title: Re: Sap pm dates
entry.content:
Look for the description of the corresponding DataSource in the online help and cross field names with view VIQMEL definition.

  • e.g. PM: Maintenance Notifications (2LIS_17_I0NOTIF) - /IMO/CMPM11

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori: Anpassungen und Erweiterbarkeit für Key User
entry.content:
@TimWuttke die Möglichkeiten hören sich sehr gut an - ab welchem release ist die Funktion in der private cloud verfügbar?

Danke, Eveline

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud Q1 ‘25 Release Highlights
entry.content:
In the first quarter of 2025, SAP Commerce Cloud introduced several significant enhancements designed to improve efficiency and security. Discover exciting updates to our Composable Storefront, explore AI-powered Commerce features, learn about the new self-service Hibernation option, and so much more.

We invite you to join us as we explore these innovative changes and other important updates introduced over the past three months. Don’t miss our Q1 2025 Release Highlights webcast for an inside look at our latest advancements.

 

Adaptive


Enhance ease of use by developing a more accessible storefront.

SAP Commerce Cloud, Composable Storefront now meets over 90% of the accessibility standards set by the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.1 (WCAG) and the 2025 European Accessibility Act. These enhancements offer a more inclusive user experience, expanding your business reach to individuals with disabilities. By adhering to these standards, you also strengthen your organization’s corporate social responsibility and help avoid the risk of penalties.

We’ve upgraded the Composable Storefront to Angular 19, enhancing the developer experience and overall performance. Additionally, the implementation of Server-Side Rendering (SSR) Error Handling streamlines development efforts. allowing for smooth degradation and effective debugging of storefront issues.

For more detailed information and future plans, watch the recent Composable Storefront webcast.

Enhance security with two-factor authentication

Implementing two-factor authentication increases customer trust and loyalty, minimizes fraud and financial losses, and ensures compliance with data protection regulations, delivering a secure and reliable shopping experience for your customers.

Furthermore, it can lower customer support costs due to fewer fraud-related incidents and increase conversion rates as customers feel assured of the site's security.

We have streamlined the implementation of two-factor authentication from the initial interaction. You can now activate two-factor authentication via email during account registration and enjoy its associated benefits.

Reduce costs by hibernating non-production environments

Hibernation gives you greater control over your commerce operations by allowing you to safely shut down non-production environments whenever needed, without any data loss or recovery risk. Hibernations can also be scheduled, such as after completing a performance testing campaign. This can result in substantial cost savings, better resource allocation, and improved security and compliance.

These advantages contribute to a more efficient, secure, and cost-effective IT infrastructure. Best of all, we have begun the rollout of this self-service process that will let you trigger this manually through the Cloud Portal or via API, eliminating the need for assistance from SAP support.

 

Insightful

Transform your shopping experience with our AI-based Shopping Assistant that speaks your customer’s language

We’re excited to announce that our AI-based Shopping Assistant, first introduced in Q4 2024 through Early Access, is now widely available to revolutionize digital commerce with intelligent and conversational shopping experiences. The Shopping Assistant utilizes advanced intent detection and Natural Language Processing to understand customer needs, offering highly personalized product recommendations directly on the product display page.

You have complete control over the user interface experience, including the ability to add custom buttons, integrate with your existing interface, or develop entirely new interaction models. It’s your brand design, supercharged by our AI.

Be sure to check out our webcast for a Practical Guide to Transforming Product Discovery with an AI Assistant.

AI-based Shopping Assistant

Streamline product image editing with Product Image Designer

Initially launched in Q3 2024, the Product Image Designer allows businesses to efficiently produce professional-quality product photography without the need for specialized design skills.

We have enhanced this tool by integrating AI-assisted functionalities that remove and replace unwanted objects, isolate individual products by removing bundled items or accessories, and refine AI-generated images before publication. These enhancements ensure that all visuals align with brand standards, accurately showcase products, and enhance customer engagement.

 AI Product Image Designer – Select and Replace Object

Connect with your customers in their preferred language

We’ve increased our language support by adding 14 new languages, including Dutch, Hindi, Czech, Polish, Swedish, Danish, Finnish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese, Turkish, and Serbian. This enhancement allows merchants to effortlessly translate or generate product descriptions and attributes, seamlessly integrating them into SAP Commerce Cloud.

With this new language support, you can expand into new global markets, connect with more customers in their native language, and ensure consistent product information across all channels. Experience a streamlined workflow that saves time and resources, empowering your business to thrive internationally.

 

Connected

Accurately price products and calculate order values for complex items

With the latest SAP S/4HANA integration, SAP Commerce Cloud users can now price products and calculate order values accurately, efficiently, and consistently from a single location.

The B2B price calculation feature in SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing applies sales pricing rules from the backend while managing cart calculations independently of backend load. This functionality allows you to set up product models and pricing rules once in the backend and apply them universally.

Run targeted and personalized promotions with multi-code coupons

Harness the power of SAP Omnichannel Pricing Promotion integration to create multi-code coupons to run targeted campaigns across other SAP Customer Experience solutions, such as SAP Emarsys, providing personalized experiences for your customers.

These targeted campaigns are designed to attract new customers, increase sales and revenue, foster customer loyalty, and enhance brand awareness. Achieve smooth and seamless customer journeys, from centralized coupon promotion definition to execution across various channels.

Setting up coupons

 For more details on the above release features, check out the following resources:

  • SAP Commerce Cloud Release Navigator single access point to release content
  • Q1 2025 SAP Commerce Cloud Release Readiness Kit
  • Performance Optimization Best Practices
  • SAP Commerce Cloud update cycle

SAP Help Portal

  • SAP Commerce Cloud What’s New

Please share your feedback in a comment and follow our SAP Commerce Cloud topic page to connect with the community!

entry.title: Re: Deploying Fiori application on S4 side on premise edi...
entry.content: no, fiori only call odata( or web service), if your bw query is consumed directly, it is through InA, and the frontend is webdynpro, not fiori.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business one

Hello,

BP address is not supported like selection criterea in the reports. In case you'll use the SAP Customer Influence, add more details.

Best Regards,

Ganna Hrivnakova

entry.title: getting "system" as value for "createdBy" aspect in sap capm
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In sap capm project for the createdBy filed instead of user name as value it is taking "system" even i have mentioned @CDS.on.insert: $user;

also i have tried with "managed" aspects but getting "system" as the value for "createdBy" field.
could anyone please help me to resolve this issue, to get the real time user info in my real time project.

note: in package.json i already have:

"cds": {
    "requires": {
      "auth": "xsuaa",



Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: How to create check logic in "Export Master Data - Bu...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

To answer directly your questions, here’s some elements of responses :

 

Can I add check logic when using “Export Master Data – Business Partners”?

Not really. That app is just for exporting data it doesn’t handle any creation or updates, so there’s no place to plug in validation or check logic there. If you're looking to run checks when business partner data is created or changed, you’d need to do that through:

  • The “Manage Business Partner Master Data” app (if you're entering data manually), or
  • Use Custom Logic (like a BAdI) to add your own validations during save

 

Can I use it to register or work with custom fields?

Again, not with this app directly since it's just exporting data, there's no registration happening here.

That said, if you’ve added custom fields through In-App Extensibility (using the “Custom Fields” app), and you've set them to be visible in UIs or APIs, then yes you can get to them through:

  • OData APIs (like API_BUSINESS_PARTNER)
  • Custom CDS Views
  • Possibly through other mass maintenance or migration tools

But not in the “Export Master Data” app itself.

 

I hope this will help you answer your questions.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Add selection criteria in F-28
entry.content:
Why did you/they select 'None' and not 'Assignment' in this case?

  • However, you should read this KBA first: 3075979 - Unable to add additional selection criterion in clearing transaction

entry.title: Re: Quick tip: How to check if the changes from the adaptation project are active?
entry.content: @RaminS @Rodri @Abinasha1 for missing Flexibility section: If you are above 7.55, this means the adaptation project is missing or inactive. Greg Malewski, Nype

entry.title: P&G - New Step in the Route Map when rejecting the form
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have a request in Performance & Goals:

Client requirement: to enable further steps in the performance approval workflow to be enabled only for those users who want to complain about their performance evaluation (grievance). So, at the and of the performance review cycle, the Employee should be able to: sign off the form, so to send it in the Completed step, OR, to send the form to the HR for the grievance. 

 

Question: Based on this requirement, is it possible  for the employee to choose into the performance form if they want to sign the form and send it to the completed step AND to have the possibility to send the form to the HR for the grievance through Rejecting button?

 

Thanks,

Konstantina

entry.title: Re: Voting needed for API Payment Advice (A2X) for including sub-items
entry.content: Link: API_PAYMENT_ADVICE_SRV - Payment Advice (A2X)

entry.title: Re: Blog It Forward - Daniel Mateo

entry.title: Re: Inbound Delivery 180000013 could not be distributed M...

Did you check the other KBAs (this one only the first one returned by the search)

entry.title: Push data from a CSV file to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to know if it’s possible to push data from a CSV file into SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using SAP Integration Suite.

 My goal:
Automate the data load process from an external source (CSV format) into SAC, ideally into a planning model or a dataset.

 What I’ve done so far:

  • CSV file is available and accessible via SFTP.

  • I’ve set up a basic iFlow in Integration Suite to read the file.

  • I’m now trying to understand how to push that data into SAC—what endpoint or API to use? What format is expected by SAC?

  • Any sample iFlow, blog post, or documentation to guide the process?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: DELTA-DTP error when loading data from 2LIS_11_VAITM
entry.content: I checked all the transactions before. But in none of these are errors recorded...

entry.title: Crystal Server Resources
entry.content: We are looking for various Crystal Server resources.  Any documentation, training, server management vendors would all be potentially helpful.  What's out there and what can folks recommend?  Thanks.

entry.title: Re: how to create multiple GL accounts using template for...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Unfortunately, there is no way to mass create G/L accounts in the S4 hana cloud public version.

The only functionality that SAP offers is in the SSCUI 150001 (Manage G/L Account Master Data) where you can only create G/L account by copy on an existing one and it has to be a manual action I'm afraid.

Here's a good video if you need to get the exact procedure :

Mass Creation of General Ledger Accounts - SAP S/4HANA Finance

I hope this will help you solving your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: how to connect sap btp with sap s/4 hana cloud private
entry.content: Hi Margit, I'm facing the same problem, but i saw that the link is only for S4Hana Cloud (Public Cloud). We are using private cloud. Communication via Cloud Connector!

entry.title: MRP Area: Create Material Assignments Automatically
entry.content:
Hi Experts

In MRP Area definition, there is check box available

If this checkbox is selected, you activate the automatic assignment of materials to the storage location MRP area as soon as the material is maintained for one of the storage locations of the MRP area.

However, when we extend or create the material to the storage location via MMSC or MRP views with Organizational level as Plant + Storage Location, the above information doesn't get updated

Did we misunderstand this checkbox?

Regards

ND

entry.title: Re: Can't copy existing app
entry.content:
Same here, and for weeks now...
Since we can't rename an APP after an import...
We can no longer save our work (copying is the only solution).
I think "Build Apps" is dead. It's very sad, it's by far the best free no-code platform!
We can no longer take the risk of working with these tools without any guarantee of longevity.

entry.title: Re: End-to-End Guide to Consume RAP application to Fiori Using SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content: Very well explained @Megastar , why some services are not showing in the dropdown?

entry.title: Re: Offboarding not triggering for a new event reason
entry.content: Dear Customer, could you help to provide screenshots of offboarding dashboard & offboarding rule? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: The New Extensibility Model from the S/4HANA Sales Perspective
entry.content: Interesting!

entry.title: Re: BI2025: Side-by-Side Migration vs. In-Place Update.
entry.content:
I agree with the previous comment - an in-place upgrade can be suitable in many situations, especially if your BI 4.3 landscape is relatively new and your systems team is happy with the OS version it's sitting on. If you look closely at the About screen, BI 2025 is technically just BI 4.4.

But especially if you're already in the cloud, side-by-side means that there's virtually zero disruption to users until you're ready to go live. Then the old virtual hardware can be easily decommissioned.

entry.title: Re: Hello. I have a question regarding UI5 ColorPalette.
entry.content:
Hello, have you used any custom functions to manipulate the functionality? If not then please raise an internal incident for this component "CA-UI5-CTR"

Let me know if you need more help

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Solution Process
entry.content: Is there any way in SAP Cloud ALM that we can add a solution process that is only specific to Private Cloud to a Public Cloud in SAP Cloud ALM? Thanks

entry.title: Fiori Elements RAP Attachment (LOB) Upload Not Refreshing UI Automatically
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a Fiori Elements app (List Report and Object Page) built with a managed, draft enabled ABAP RAP business object, exposed in an OData V4 service. The root entity includes an attachment (LOB) field. 

When I upload an attachment via the Object Page, the new file only becomes visible after I manually refresh the page. This happens both in the deployed app and in the SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) preview. However, in the Eclipse ADT preview, the new attachment shows up immediately after upload (no manual refresh needed). Moreover, if I expose the exact same RAP BO in a OData V2 service, the problem also does not occur in the deployed app.

I noticed that:

  • In the Eclipse ADT preview, the $batch request executed after file upload contains both a PATCH (for the upload) and a follow-up GET (which refreshes the entity/attachment list).

  • In the deployed app/BAS preview, the batch request only contains the PATCH; the GET is missing, so the UI doesn’t update until I refresh.

However, the SAP UI5 framework version is same in all environments (1.120.15).

I attempted to solve this using side-effects (both in the BDEF and in the XML annotations), but without any success.

Does anyone know what might cause the difference and/or how it can be solved?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Mass MRP Area assignment in Material master SAP S/4 HANA 1709
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are facing issues related to MRP Area definition

MRP Area: Create Material Assignments Automatically

If this checkbox is selected, you activate the automatic assignment of materials to the storage location MRP area as soon as the material is maintained for one of the storage locations of the MRP area.

With the above checkbox indicator set, wherever the material is extended or created to the relevant storage location then MRP Area needs to be assigned along with other details.

Did anyone faced similar issue and what action was taken

Regards

Nitin Desai

entry.title: Re: Change created own overhead rate in costing sheet
entry.content:
Hi,

just to add to what my colleague already said: it is sadly not possible to delete your overhead rate P200 itself and a change of the dependency is also not possible after creation. If you want to have a custom overhead rate with another dependency, you have to delete all entries for P200 in the costing sheet and recreate a new one with the correct dependency.

Best regards
Marvin

entry.title: Re: Multiple clicks on the button press - UI5
entry.content:
A little bit late, but I think this answer can help other developers. 
You can prevent the double click by setting the Busy Indicator (with delay 0, default is 1000ms I think). This is not available on a button but e.g. on a dialog or a panel. So it is important that you choose  the wrapper component around the button to set the busy indicator and not the button itself.
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/entity/sap.ui.core.Control/sample/sap.ui.core.sample.ControlBusyIndicator/code

entry.title: Kickstart your SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager adoption with our new e-learning
entry.content:
Hello SAP Signavio community,

SAP Signavio Value Map team is excited to announce that we have released our new SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager E-Learning from the SAP Signavio Adoption Starter series.

What is the session about?

Dive into the essentials of SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager with this e-learning course designed to accelerate your understanding and adoption. As a new addition to the SAP Signavio Transformation Suite, the Process Transformation Manager enables you to collaboratively plan, manage, and execute transformation initiatives leading to quantifiable success. Empower your organization to take advantage of the centralized and collaborative improvements, value-driven decision-making, and quantifiable business value through continuous improvements. Perfect for business analysts, process managers, and IT professionals seeking to enhance decision-making and operational efficiency.

What are the session goals?

  • Learn how to set up SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager
  • Understand process transformation management
  • Understand the SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager Capabilities

How to get in?

If you haven't yet signed up for the SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps, don't worry, we've got you covered! Get started with SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps here. (Check out our step-by-step instructional video on how to join SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value maps.)

Direct link to the new E-Learning session:

SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Transformation Manager

Do you need any additional help?

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "SAP Signavio | Business Process Transformation" topic).

Happy learning!

entry.title: Re: Learning License User Types in SAP SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content:
@kchamarthy I see that it states that the license type on matters for reporting and licensing only. Can you confirm there is no impact to the end user. Functional license users can still take learning courses that require for compliance? Is there anything else to be aware of 

Support told me when I asked about any impact to end users... "We highly advise that you consult with a certified Learning implementation partner to assist you and answer any question you may have in relation to this setup/configuration." It seems quite simple from the steps outlined in this blog post why would I need to talk to an implementation partner?

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 2020: Automatic assignment of Storage Location MRP Area to Material Master
entry.content:
Hi @Caetano 

Thanks for your blog.

I had similar issue that the MRP Area was not assigned automatically for a material while extending to storage location using MM01. However the tick box is present in the configuration for the plant + MRP Area type 02 for the storage location.

We have X0 as MRP Type at the plant level.

Regards

Nitin D

entry.title: SAP CPI: Not able to pick done file
entry.content:
Using Sender SFTP, I am trying to pick the Main file based on Read lock strategy as Completion file.

 

Main file Naming Format: abc.TXT
Done/completion File Format: abc_CMPL.TXT

What should be the format of Done file Naming. Seems it only supports when extension is .done.

Please suggest

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Cloud Identity Services (Identity Authentication - IAS) with SAP Audit Log Viewe
entry.content: Does the logs include also Change logs of IAS - e.g. if someone changes a certain attribute of a user - either from the UI or the API. Will this be visible there?

entry.title: Re: MRP Area: Create Material Assignments Automatically
entry.content:
Did you also assign the profile to the MRP Area in the MRP Area customizing (transaction OMIZ)

(Please add a tag relevant to your SAP version: ERP, S/4HANA, cloud, etc.)

entry.title: Re: Deploying Fiori application on S4 side on premise edi...
entry.content:
yes OData is mandatory.

via SEGW or using RAP

in SEGW->Call function best option I believe to consume RFC as is...

METHOD userdetail_get_entity.

  DATA: ls_userdetails TYPE bapiaddr3,
        lt_return     TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2.

  DATA: lv_username TYPE sy-uname.

  " Get input from request
  io_tech_request_context->get_converted_keys( IMPORTING es_key_values = DATA(ls_keys) ).
  lv_username = ls_keys-username.

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_USER_GET_DETAIL'
    EXPORTING
      username = lv_username
    IMPORTING
      address  = ls_userdetails
    TABLES
      return   = lt_return.

  " Map to entity structure
  er_entity = VALUE #( 
    username  = lv_username
    firstname = ls_userdetails-firstname
    lastname  = ls_userdetails-lastname
    email     = ls_userdetails-e_mail
  ).

ENDMETHOD.

thanks

entry.title: Re: Service Quotation in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello @Melissa_Pineda 

Thank you for your follow-up.


The app you are looking for is "Service Quotation Items - Analytical List Page" (App ID: F6459). Please ensure the following when searching for the app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition,

  • You are assigned the necessary business role – typically, SAP_BR_SERVICE_MANAGER or a custom role with access to service analytics.
  • You are searching under "All Applications" in the App Finder or via the App Library.
  • If the name doesn't produce results, could you try searching by the App ID F6459?


Unfortunately, I cannot share a screenshot directly here, but if the app is not visible to you, it may be due to role restrictions or scope item activation (e.g. scope item 4GA – Service Quotation Processing must be active).
Please let me know if you need further assistance system.


Best regards,
Chuma

entry.title: Custom Fields in Contract Cash Flow (Fiori App F5491)
entry.content:
Dear Community,
I have created some additional fields for RE-FX Contracts in the “Custom Fields and Logic” app (F1481) and activated them for all possible objects.
The fields are available in the “Contract Management” app (F5273), for example, and I can also make them visible and use them in the SAP GUI by customizing the sections/screens and Badis etc..
However, the fields are not visible in the APP “Contract Cash Flow” (F5491), although they are visible in the GUI transaction REISCDCF.
Do any of you know the reason for this? Is there anything I can do to get the additional fields into the report?

Thanks in advance for any advice!

Regards
Rado

entry.title: Re: MRP Area: Create Material Assignments Automatically
entry.content: Yes

entry.title: Re: RAP100 - There are no sections. The page is empty.
entry.content:
Hi, KohZL.

It worked.
Thanks.

entry.title: Re: EDIT HIRE RECORD BY IMPORT
entry.content: Dear Customer, based on the advise provided by JaninaHornig, I tested in sap demo system and confirmed that it is possible to edit hire record via imcremental load import. But please make sure in imported file, seq-number is set as 1, then it is able to import. If seq-number is empty, then error will reports.

entry.title: Re: Where can I get the user's profile language
entry.content: THANKS

entry.title: Re: SAP Community All Time - 47 to 50 is missing or is it...
entry.content: Hi @YashikaYTD - this must be a bug as we have not reserved any numbers. I will create a ticket and get back to you as soon as I know more.

entry.title: How to Create Previous year key figure Linked to Current year figure in Custom Analytical Query?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have a requirement to Create Previous year which should be fetch automatically  from Current Year, while creating Query in Custom Analytical query app.

For example-

Suppose we are in fiscal year 2025, while fetching data from query user will input only current year, on the basis of which Previous year should automatically be fetched.

How can this be achieved through Custom analytical query.

Thanks and Regards,

Mayank Gupta

entry.title: Re: Feasibility of Assigning Different Smart Forms to the...
entry.content:
Hello @VA19 

Thank you for your question.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, standard configuration does not support assigning different smart forms to the same billing type based on sales area. The Output Parameter Determination (OPD) framework primarily uses parameters such as Billing Type, Sales Organisation, and Customer to determine output forms.

However, you might consider the following approaches:

  1. Utilise Available OPD Parameters: Leverage existing parameters like Sales Organisation within OPD to differentiate from assignments where possible.
  2. Custom Logic Implementation: If further differentiation is needed, explore the possibility of implementing custom logic using Business Add-Ins (BAdIs), such as SD_BIL_OUTPUT_PARAM_MODIFY, to select forms based on sales area dynamically.
  3. Form Template Enhancements: Incorporate conditional logic within Adobe Form templates to adjust content or layout based on sales area information.

For detailed guidance on configuring Output Parameter Determination, please refer to the SAP Help Portal:

Output Parameter Determination – SAP Help Portal

If you require assistance, please feel free to reach out.

Best regards

entry.title: "IMPORT FAILED" error - Can't import project from Build Apps standard plan
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We upgraded from Build Apps free plan to Build Apps standard plan following this: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/upgrade-to-sap-build-apps-standard-edition?q=import

We had 56 projects in the free plan, that we exported as recommended in order to import them back to Build Apps standard plan once installed.

However, instead of having 0 project in the brand new standard plan like in the tutorial video, we noticed that 19 projects were already listed there. We tried to import a project but we keep having the following error message (despite the fact the so called project is NOT in the project list of the Build lobby):

IMPORT FAILED
Project eu10.yjdhdjdj… already exists
Correlation Id: 748h67….

We saw the following note but unless mistaken it seems to suggest no solution: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003521702

Just contacted SAP Support about it but if anyone of you knows how to fix this, that would be really appreciated.

Thanks,

BR,

LM.

entry.title: Re: COPA Error during release of Billing Document to Financials - KE0C133 on VBELN - Conversion to S
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your well-documented solution!

Hi,

We don't see the updates on the material master with MRP Type X0. Is there any possibility that the background job has failed?

Regards

ND

entry.title: Re: MRP Area: Create Material Assignments Automatically
entry.content:
• Does the storage location already have a MARD entry before the MRP area is assigned via the MRP area profile?
  • Is the MRP type set to 'ND' at plant level?

entry.content: Hi all, any news about this topic? I have the same issue. Is there any solution?

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP virtual field leads to out of memory

entry.title: Re: getting "system" as value for "createdBy" aspect in sap capm
entry.content: It needs some more details... how do you call your endpoint?

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP virtual field leads to out of memory
entry.content: enjoy... took me some time to understand it

entry.title: Re: MRP Area: Create Material Assignments Automatically
entry.content: MARD entry for the corresponding Storage location was not present (for other sloc., it was). At plant level MRP type is X0

entry.title: Putting people at the heart of change management to achieve successful digital transformation
entry.content:
For 150 years, Heidelberg Materials has been committed to driving progress. With more than 51,000 employees at almost 3,000 sites in more than 50 countries, the company ranks among the largest integrated producers of building materials and solutions globally, including leading market positions in cement, aggregates, and ready-mixed concrete. Its products and services are used in the construction of houses, infrastructure, and commercial and industrial facilities. 

To remain an industry leader and foster future innovation, Heidelberg Materials has initiated its ASCEND Program, which focuses on transitioning its ERP system to a cloud-based platform. The success of this initiative largely relies on ensuring employee buy-in and minimizing business disruption. To facilitate this process, Heidelberg Materials leverages its own expertise by partnering with trusted experts and support services to ensure that these transformative changes are centered around enhancing the human experience.

Before: Challenges and opportunities 

  • Prepare for a major IT systems transformation to ensure industry-leading technology innovation, with the aim to leverage an organizational change management approach
  • Plan for the use of modern digital engagement tools and data-driven insights to ensure transparency into the effectiveness of change management and engagement activities, enabling a focus on the most impactful actions and facilitating a people-centric approach

Why SAP

  • Scalable, data-driven approach to deploying SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition using SAP Organizational Change Management services and deep transformation insight
  • SAP Advisory Services portfolio to facilitate a clear understanding of focus areas, putting people at the center
  • Alignment with the hybrid, agile approach from SAP Services and Support
  • Early risk identification and proactive mitigation to support user adoption and project success

After: Value-driven results

  • Implementation and orchestration of employee engagement feedback architecture using a structured change-sentiment framework across project and organizational units, including iteration measurements at critical project milestones
  • Clear insights into stakeholder reception and experiences throughout the project lifecycle
  • Usage of the insights gained as the basis for precise actions to speed up and support solution adoption

SAP.com URL: https://www.sap.com/documents/2025/03/a647b378-f87e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Rückblick auf das SAP Training und Change Forum 2024 mit Aufnahmen, Folien und Podcasts

Lightning Talk: Build the foundation for sustainable SAP S/4HANA transformation with change management (Slides I Recording)

entry.title: Re: RELEASE STRATEGY PURCHASE REQUISITION
entry.content:
Hi Expert

I have deleted the values and checked the single value box. However, in the CL24N when saving, it shows the following inconsistency

 

CL24N Strategy 

The solution I proposed, based on adding values to the characteristic, is only functional for the release strategy in which it is required not to determine the strategy when the item has a contract number, and to determine it when it does not.

However, this solution does not apply to other service requisition release strategies, where the strategy is required to be determined regardless of whether or not a contract exists.

In summary, what is required is that:

In the release strategy for MRP (requisitions for goods), the strategy is only determined if the item does not have a contract.

In the release strategies for service requests, the strategy is always determined whether or not the item has a contract.

I remain attentive to your help

Percy

entry.title: Re: Preferred unit of measure
entry.content:
Hello,

Below are answers to your questions,

  1. Preferred UoM at Warehouse Level
  • Not directly maintained as “preferred UoM” per warehouse.
  • Controlled via:
    • Stock-specific UoM in Product Master (e.g., BAG).
    • Warehouse Process Type settings and Packaging Specifications.
  1. Inbound: PO in PC → Task in PAL?
  • By default, inbound tasks follow base UoM (PC).
  • To get 1 PAL = 48 PC:
    • Maintain Packaging Specification.
    • Enable HU management and auto-packing logic.
  1. Outbound: Picking Task in BAG?
  • Yes, if BAG is set as stock-specific UoM.
  • Ensure:
    • BAG is defined in Product and Warehouse Product Master.
    • Use Warehouse Process Types or Packaging Specs to enforce BAG during picking.

Summary

Task

App / Setting

Notes

Define preferred UoM

Product Master / Stock-Specific UoM

Set BAG

Inbound PAL task creation

Packaging Specification

1 PAL = 48 PC

Outbound picking in BAG

Warehouse Product / Process Type / Packaging Spec

Requires customizing

Feel free to reach out if you need further support

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: German xRechnung Templates for SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello Kristof, thank you very much for the XSLT files for processing incoming supplier invoices. The call for sending e-invoices is getting louder and louder and we would be happy if you could also provide an XSLT for sending customer invoices. The remaining standard functionality allows the sending of a PDF and a transformed XML, we now only need a suitable XSLT to be able to send invoices as X-invoices.

Best regards

Pascal

entry.title: Re: Blog It Forward - Daniel Mateo
entry.content:
Hi Dani. I enjoyed your blog. It gives a nice look into your daily life and also shares great insights for the SAP world, now and in the future.

Thanks a lot for tagging me. I’ve followed you for a while, and your content is always amazing. It's a must for anyone in SAP, especially in finance and controlling.

Since you like the beaches in Barcelona, it would be awesome to see you one day here in Recife, where I live, or even in Fortaleza 😎☀️, where you’re already known as a great speaker in online events.

Grande Abraço!

entry.title: Re: How can I upload mass vendor invoices, any standard F...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please be aware that there are hidden columns when downloading template. The field 'Partner Bank Type' should be one of the hidden columns.

Best regards,
Jonathan

entry.title: Extract configuration from Integration Design artifacts via API
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I want to build some sort of visualization of all iflows using a Scheduler and the date/time when they are going to run.

Usually the schedulers are externalized in our tenant to not require a new version and transport if we need to change it.

I used the Integration Suite APIs to access the configuration of an iFlow to see how the response looks like:

https://<tenant>.it-cpi001.cfapps.<subaccountregion>.hana.ondemand.com/api/v1/IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts(Id='<iFlowID>',Version='<Version>')/Configurations

 And the response for the scheduler parameter is:

"ParameterKey": "Scheduler",
"ParameterValue": "simple.repeat --tz=Etc/GMT --startAt=2025-04-25T02:40:00 --endAt=2034-01-01T17:59:00",
"DataType": "custom:schedule"

Comparing with the actual configuration:

We miss important information, like the day of the week when it is scheduled... 

I could not find documentation of the information that is given in the response to understand what is possible:

Can someone suggest if there would be a better way of extracting this information or where to find more documentation?

Many thanks in advance

Best regards

Javier

PS.- If you want to use the TryOut directly in the SAP Business Accelator Hub, the url is partly hardcoded to the urls of the NEO environment, so it will not work with CF...

I left one comment using the feedback option. Hopefully it can be improved in the future, but I guess everyone uses Postman or Bruno these days 😁

entry.title: Re: Screen enhancement in IW24 (PM notification)
entry.content:
It would be helpful, when you figure things out, to share your knowledge for the benefit of those asking the same question.

thank you

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to enable ILX on the mobile app?
entry.content:
Hi @AlexC 

As per https://me.sap.com/notes/3597150, once the tenant is configure to have the 'New Learning Experience' toggle hidden, the same gets reflected in the mobile app, although there is an expected delay.

Maybe your team can test it in a Stage/Preview tenant?

entry.title: Re: how to bring consolidation group in the public cloud...
entry.content:
Hello,

in Warehouse Management in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition the consolidation group is determined per ship-to party, route, and priority combination on level of the delivery item in shipping. 

Best regards, Tobias

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI: Not able to pick done file
entry.content:
Hello Mohit, 

The format of done file should be ${file:name}.done

Example : hello.txt is the file to be consumed, hello.txt.done is the associated .done-file.

Please check the below link for more details :

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/configure-sftp-sender-adapter 

 

Thanks,

Punith
